name: Yemenite Zhug (Yemenite Hot Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp dried hot red pepper flakes, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
Blend all ingredients in a food processor until smooth. The mixture should yield about one pint and can be stored in the refrigerator for several days.
Variations:
- Use whole chiles instead of just the seeds; they provide more flavor and heat.
- Add olive oil during blending for a richer texture.
- For "dried hot red pepper flakes," use equal parts ground habs (chilies) and chipotles.
- Using 5 whole heads of garlic ensures a robust flavor profile. Do not reduce the amount.
This versatile sauce can be added to salad dressings, marinades, or any dish that benefits from a spicy kick. Enjoy experimenting with different combinations!
